title: Nizami Brothers starting in 15 mins!
description: The main performance of the night is about to begin. Head to the Cultural Stage for the best view.

title: Crescent Bazaar is very busy
description: The Bazaar area is currently at high capacity. We recommend visiting the Shaan-E-Ramzan exhibits for a more relaxed experience.

title: Visit the Mr. Barkat Alam Khan Lounge
description: Complimentary refreshments for VIP pass holders at the main lounge area.

title: Iftar is served!
description: The fast has opened. Wishing everyone a blessed Iftar. Please follow the queues at food stalls.
